blocked_items.title: Merrill, Jump and Glia Deploy AI Meeting and Workflow Agents to Tens of Thousands of Advisors
blocked_items.reason: Fabricated claims: The entry states Bank of America's '$4 billion annual AI investment budget' is the total technology investment — the source states Bank of America invests '$13.5 billion annually on technology, including $4 billion for AI and other new initiatives.' The entry omits the $13.5 billion total and implies $4 billion is the full annual technology investment, but more critically the entry correctly cites $4 billion for AI, so this is not a direct contradiction. However, the entry describes it as 'backed by Bank of America's $4 billion annual AI investment budget' which is accurate per the source.; The headline states 'Tens of Thousands of Advisors' — Jump has 27,000 advisors, but Merrill and Glia deployment numbers are not specified in the source, making the aggregated 'tens of thousands' claim not directly supported for those firms
